schema.name: span_floors_rules
schema.purpose: Decide void span (start_floor/end_floor) from building context + void_type + intensity + patterns.

ep1_contract.note: 이 엔진은 EP1 Program Tree를 수정하지 않는다. span 결정값은 VoidNode에 기록되며 EP1 Program Tree 구조(adjacency, layers, patterns)를 변경하지 않는다.

inputs_expected.selected_patterns: string[] — EP1 pattern ID 목록. 빈 배열([]) 허용, 이 경우 pattern_span_adjustments 미적용.

ep1_spaces.note: anchor_floor_hint 미제공 시 anchor_spaces의 floor를 fallback으로 사용. MULTI_LEVEL span은 from_floor ~ to_floor 전체 참여.

void_candidate.void_type: COURTYARD_VOID | ATRIUM | DOUBLE_HEIGHT | INDUSTRIAL_HIGH_BAY | RAMP_CONTINUUM | LIGHT_WELL | MEZZANINE_OVERLAP

pattern_span_adjustments.pending_note: EP1 Pattern Library 미등록. 추후 추가 시 if_any_patterns로 이동.
pattern_span_adjustments.reason: central vertical space becomes legible and useful

pattern_span_adjustments.pending_note: EP1 Pattern Library 미등록. 추후 추가 시 if_any_patterns로 이동.
pattern_span_adjustments.reason: linear organization tends to distribute instead of stacking around a big void
courtyard logic usually stabilizes at 1~2 floors

pattern_span_adjustments.pending_note: EP1 Pattern Library 미등록. RAMP_CONTINUUM은 현재 void_type으로만 존재. 패턴 등록 시 이동.

anchor_hint_resolution.ANCHOR_HINT_OR_2: anchor_floor_hint 제공 시 해당 층, 미제공 시 2층으로 fallback

start_floor_rules.reason: Courtyard void는 지면층에 고정되어 외부 경관 및 진입 시퀀스를 지원함.
often internal device that can begin above lobby level

steps: 2) Get base span typ S_base from base_span_by_vertical_intensity[VI].typ.
3) Get void_type constraints: min_v, max_v, prefer_start_floor.
4) Apply pattern_span_adjustments to S_base => S_adj (delta_typ, min_override, etc.).
6) Cap by building size: S_cap = max(1, floor(F * max_span_cap_by_total_floors_ratio)). span = min(span, S_cap). Safety clamp: span = min(span, F).
7) Decide start_floor using start_floor_rules; default is ground_floor_index (1) unless allowed mid-start.
9) If end_floor > F: end_floor = F, start_floor = max(ground_floor_index, end_floor - span + 1). Recompute span_count = end_floor - start_floor + 1.
